---
name: Bug
about: Something on the live site or in the build doesn't behave as expected
title: '[bug] '
labels: bug
---

## What happened

A clear, one-paragraph description. Screenshot helps if it's visual.

## Where

- URL (production or PR preview):
- Viewport width / browser / OS:
- Section / component:

## Expected

What you thought would happen.

## Audit / CI state

If you tried locally:

- [ ] `python3 build.py` succeeded
- [ ] `python3 audit.py` shows N/N PASS (paste the line)
- [ ] `npm test` / Playwright result:
- [ ] Lighthouse / vnu output if relevant
